subject: Questions regarding contract renewal & pricing sheet
summary: Customer reached out asking for the updated pricing grid for the upcoming contract renewal in September. They want to know if there are volume discounts available.

subject: Thank you for the quick resolution on billing issue!
summary: Customer sent a thank-you email following the resolution of the billing correction ticket. Highly satisfied with Sarah's swift support.

subject: Feedback on security compliance dashboard reports
summary: The customer expressed frustration with exporting custom compliance reports. They mentioned it is blocking their internal audit process.

subject: Okta SSO integration blocker - Production rollout delayed
summary: Urgent escalation regarding the Okta integration failure. They cannot roll out the software to 550+ employees tomorrow without a working SSO system.

subject: Compliance documentation received
summary: Acknowledged receipt of SOC2 and ISO compliance documents. They thanked Emily for getting these over quickly.

subject: Platform onboarding status check
summary: Alex Rivera requested a sync. Customer reports onboarding is progressing well, although bulk seat upload formatting instructions were slightly confusing.

subject: Disappointed with feature updates
summary: User complains that the recent update changed the navigation menu and made it harder for their delivery drivers to check tasks on mobile devices.

subject: Inquiry regarding custom data warehouse connectors
summary: Customer is checking if we support Snowflake data ingestion natively or if they need to write a custom ETL pipeline.

subject: CRITICAL: Severe service degradation on our API endpoints
summary: Strongly worded email from Tyrell CTO. Webhooks are throwing errors causing double-booking issues in their robotic scheduling pipeline.

subject: Follow up on contract approval status
summary: Alex River sent a follow-up. The legal team at Cyberdyne is reviewing the liability clauses, expecting signatures by early next week.

subject: Stellar performance of the reporting engine
summary: CTO emailed to praise the speed of the updated analytics engine, noting it reduced their weekly board reporting workload by 4 hours.

subject: Feature request: Column headers for exports
summary: Polite request to include IP address headers in the audit logs. The current layout is causing their parser scripts to crash.

subject: Onboarding coordinator contact
summary: Marcus Chen sent welcome emails and instructions for setting up the developer sandbox workspace. Awaiting response.

subject: Subscription cancellation query
summary: The manager is asking if there are any fees associated with canceling or downgrading a Basic account before the annual term ends.

subject: Consulting dashboard template query
summary: Inquiry about whether template permissions can be shared across multiple child client accounts in the dashboard.

subject: URGENT: API key rotations blocked in panel
summary: Security administrator reported they cannot cycle their API keys, which is a compliance requirement that must be done today.

subject: License expansion contract confirmation
summary: Confirmed they signed the addendum for 100 extra seats. Appreciative of the speed in processing the order.

subject: Billing inquiry - unexpected charge
summary: Customer wants clarification on an extra $50 usage fee on their last invoice, which was for exceeding API query limits.

subject: Love the user interface design!
summary: Marketing director sent feedback saying the dashboard layout is the best they have seen, allowing them to track campaigns seamlessly.

subject: API speed issues on large exports
summary: Developer notes that pulling 90+ days of log data times out. They want to know if pagination is supported on that endpoint.

subject: Billing update issues
summary: Customer success rep reached out about the recurring error when updating their corporate Mastercard details.
